query:
ALTER TABLE `sessions` 
MODIFY COLUMN `sessionValue` decimal(10,2) AFTER `modality`,
MODIFY COLUMN `isPaid` enum('pending','paid','waived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' AFTER `sessionValue`,
MODIFY COLUMN `cancelReason` text AFTER `isPaid`,
MODIFY COLUMN `rejectionReason` text AFTER `cancelReason`,
MODIFY COLUMN `rejectionDate` timestamp AFTER `rejectionReason`,
MODIFY COLUMN `notes` text AFTER `rejectionDate`;
command:

MODIFY COLUMN `rejectionReason` text AFTER `cancelReason`,
MODIFY COLUMN `rejectionDate` timestamp AFTER `rejectionReason`,
MODIFY COLUMN `notes` text AFTER `rejectionDate`;
